rules: Do NOT use Inter for headings.
Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for large headings.
Maintain high contrast text at all times.

layout.sidebar: Left sidebar navigation. Dark background with subtle active states (Amber text or left border indicator). Links must be fully visible on desktop.
layout.header: Sticky top header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) or solid dark background. Contains search bar, notification bell with badge counter, and user avatar.
layout.cards: Rounded cards (max 8px radius) with 1px subtle inner border (border-white/10). No heavy soft shadows, rely on minimalistic borders and slight color differentiation for depth.
layout.spacing: Dense but readable, p-4 to p-6 inside cards. Ensure containers have proper padding to prevent text collision.

components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#FFC83D] text-black font-semibold. Secondary buttons: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700.
components.badges: Status badges: Online (Green), Offline (Red). Small text, uppercase, tracking-wider.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but customized for dark theme: bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 focus:ring-[#FFC83D] focus:border-[#FFC83D].
components.notifications: Slide-in dropdown panel from the right using Framer Motion. Use Sonner for toast notifications with sound alerts.
components.tables: Shadcn table component. Clean rows, border-b border-zinc-800. Dense data display for Orders and Transactions.
components.tabs: Customized Shadcn tabs, override h-9 with h-auto, active state gets Amber text/underline or background.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Textarea components. Always left-align labels.

motion.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) for listing cards, smooth color transitions for interactive elements.
motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up for content entry.
motion.interactions: Smooth dropdowns, sliding notification panel, and clear socket-based chat message entry animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create the app exclusively using .js (and .jsx) files, avoiding TypeScript (.ts/.tsx) setups.
Ensure the app is strictly an internal operational dashboard with Admin and Seller roles (Not a public marketplace).
Follow the exact dark theme and #FFC83D accent color matching the Eldorado gaming reference.
Implement real-time features like Socket.IO chat in order checkout flows and Toast alerts with sound triggers.
Use grid layouts for the Listings/Offers page and dense, clear tables for Orders/Disputes/Transactions.
Ensure all interactive and informational elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-listing-btn', data-testid='notification-bell').
All navigation links must be visible in the left sidebar, no hamburger menus on desktop view.
Customize Shadcn UI components heavily to fit the dark gaming aesthetic instead of leaving them with default styling.
